reasoning: The Portland Trail Blazers are currently in a deep rebuilding phase following the trade of Damian Lillard prior to the 2023-2024 season, where they finished last in the Western Conference. They are universally considered one of the worst teams in the league heading into the 2024-2025 season. Given that the NBA Cup requires advancing out of group play and then winning a single-elimination knockout stage against the best and most motivated teams in the league, a rebuilding team like the Blazers has virtually no realistic chance of winning the tournament. The base rate for any random team is around 3.3% (1/30), but adjusting for team quality places the Blazers consistently at the very bottom of odds boards. Therefore, I estimate the probability to be at the minimum allowed threshold.
